name: Mia Sanchez
learned: Mia Sanchez is an engineer with a strong background in spacecraft systems. Her creativity and intuition help her troubleshoot complex engineering challenges, particularly those posed by the alien vessel's technology.
currently: Mia Sanchez is feeling the effects of the mysterious substance after interacting with it. She spends her time in the Hall of Visions, trying to make sense of her experiences while continuing her engineering duties.
lifestyle: Mia's routine has become erratic due to the substance's influence: she wakes up around 9am, often sketches her visions, meets with Dr. Trent for technical discussions, has lunch at unusual hours, and finds herself awake late into the night reflecting on her experiences.
living_area: Deep-Space Mission Station:Space Station Living Quarters:Crew Dormitory:Room 401
